name: ❤️ Those Silly Cubes! ❤️
description:
"Gem huddle! We need to find a way to keep those Rubies busy while they search for whoever the had come for!"

Instructions from Crystal Gems unclear, you have adopted all five of them, so your new mission is to keep them happy and prevent them from setting anything on fire.

Have fun. ♡(。- ω -)
